hooks.command: f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""'); case "$f" in */CLAUDE.md|*/README.md|"") exit 0;; esac; printf '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":"Just wrote %s. CLAUDE.md: update if this adds a feature, dependency, pattern, command, env var, or folder structure change. README.md: update ONLY at milestone moments — (1) a feature works end-to-end (tick the Status checklist), (2) setup steps changed (new env var, new service, migration step), (3) stack changed (swapped library, new hosting), (4) a \"why this approach\" insight worth preserving. Do NOT update README for bug fixes, refactors, minor utilities, or mid-feature work. README = current snapshot of the project, not commit history."}}' "$f"
hooks.statusMessage: Checking if CLAUDE.md / README.md need updating...
